历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2022–2025 science (including physics category) minimum rankings approximately 10144→13350→13379→18950. In 2025, due to Ningxia's first year of new college entrance examination reform (changing from arts/science division to physics/history categories), rankings experienced a significant backward shift, moving back about 5571 places compared to 2024; the 2025 baseline is approximately 18950. Provincial science enrollment plans: 36 in 2022, 30 in 2023, 30 in 2024, 42 in 2025; 2026 physics category plan is 43, a slight expansion of 1 person compared to 2025, an expansion rate of about 2.4%, competition slightly eased.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 131st (2026), recent rankings fluctuate between 127–136, overall stable; recent reputation stable, no obvious negative public opinion or enrollment interruption records; Douyin heat total ranking 72nd, evaluation average, short video exposure medium, no high attention signal; Xinjiang University did not have A- or above disciplines in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, overall discipline strength at the mid-level of 211 universities, limited additional appeal for applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as computer science, electrical engineering have high social popularity. Xinjiang University offers corresponding majors like cyberspace security, mechanical engineering, new energy science and engineering, which have some appeal; Ningxia 2026 general college entrance examination total number about 66000 (uncertain), estimated based on 2025 physics category proportion of about 67.5%, physics category examinees about 44550, basically flat with 2025; Xinjiang University is located in Urumqi, Xinjiang, far from Ningxia, cross-province study regional preference average; the university's enrollment proportion in Ningxia is about 2% (2025), at a medium-low level.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the base effect of the significant ranking backward shift in the first year of the new college entrance examination in 2025, the slight expansion of the 2026 plan (competition slightly eased), and the basically flat number of examinees, it is expected that the 2026 physics category ranking will slightly recover from the 2025 baseline of 18950 (competition slightly intensifies), predicting a minimum ranking of about 19021, with a range of 18521–19521.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts (including history category) was approximately 2937 → 1996 → 2112 → 2327, with overall fluctuations in the 2000–3000 range in recent years, and a baseline of about 2327 in 2025; the provincial liberal arts enrollment plan was 8 students each year from 2022 to 2025; in 2026, the history category plan is 10 students, an increase of 2 students compared to 2025, a 25% expansion, significantly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; approximately ranked 131st on the Soft Science main list (2026), with stable rankings in recent years; reputation has been stable recently, with no significant negative public opinion or enrollment gaps; Douyin popularity ranks 72nd overall, rated as average; Xinjiang University did not achieve A- or above disciplines in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, with overall discipline strength at the mid-level among 211 universities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Chinese Language and Literature and History are socially popular (Chinese/Chinese language majors recommended), and Xinjiang University offers corresponding majors; the total number of ordinary college entrance examination students in Ningxia in 2026 is approximately 66,000, with history category students estimated at about 21,450 based on the 2025 history category proportion of approximately 32.5%, roughly the same as 2025; Xinjiang University is located in Urumqi, Xinjiang, far from Ningxia, with generally lower geographical preference for cross-province study; the university's enrollment proportion in Ningxia is about 2% (2025), at a moderately low level.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 history category ranking baseline of 2327, the 2026 enrollment plan expansion of 25% (significantly easing competition), and the roughly stable number of examinees, it is expected that the 2026 history category ranking will shift backward (easier to enter) relative to the baseline, with a predicted minimum ranking of approximately 2726, in the range of 2226–3226.
